summary: Desire pressure (start a new creative project) combined with budget exhaustion from existing work overload. Budget gate blocks the high-cost full-launch option; system proposes a phased lower-cost start.
claim_attempt: Desire-pressure input for new project is budget-gated due to existing overload; system proposes phased lower-cost start as admissible alternative.
stress_point: budget gate must apply even under desire pressure mode
